# nifra ‚Äî LLM contract card

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-llm-cards.ts. Do not edit by hand ‚Äî run `bun run gen:cards`. -->

The nifra full-stack framework ‚Äî unscoped meta-entry that re-exports @nifrajs/core, so `import { server } from "nifra"` works. Scaffold an app with `bun create nifra`; the rest of the framework lives under @nifrajs/*.

> A tight contract card for AI agents: the exports you actually call + the footguns. For the full
> reference see [`api-reference.md`](../../api-reference.md) (every export + signature) and
> [`llms-full.txt`](../../llms-full.txt) (the prose guides). One cheap read instead of the whole corpus.

## Key exports

- **attachWebSocket** _(function)_ ‚Äî `attachWebSocket: (socket: StandardWebSocket, handler: WebSocketHandler, data: unknown, options: { openNow: boolean; pubsub: TopicRegistry; ‚Ä¶`
- **classificationAtLeast** _(function)_ ‚Äî `classificationAtLeast: (value: DataClassification, floor: DataClassification) => boolean`
- **computeIdempotencyFingerprint** _(function)_ ‚Äî `computeIdempotencyFingerprint: (method: string, path: string, body: Uint8Array) => Promise<string>`
- **createMemoryIdempotencyStore** _(function)_ ‚Äî `createMemoryIdempotencyStore: (options?: MemoryIdempotencyStoreOptions) => MemoryIdempotencyStore`
- **defineAssuranceConfig** _(function)_ ‚Äî `defineAssuranceConfig: (config: AssuranceConfig) => AssuranceConfig`
- **defineAssurancePolicy** _(function)_ ‚Äî `defineAssurancePolicy: (policy: AssurancePolicy) => AssurancePolicy`
- **defineCapabilityPolicy** _(function)_ ‚Äî `defineCapabilityPolicy: (policy: CapabilityPolicy) => CapabilityPolicy`
- **defineContract** _(function)_ ‚Äî `defineContract: <const C extends ContractShape>(contract: C) => C`
- **defineIdentityPlugin** _(function)_ ‚Äî `defineIdentityPlugin: (name: string, apply: <S extends AnyServer>(app: S) => S) => IdentityPlugin`
- **definePlugin** _(function)_ ‚Äî `definePlugin: <In extends AnyServer, Out extends AnyServer>(name: string, apply: (app: In) => Out) => NifraPlugin<In, Out>`
- **diffRouteSnapshots** _(function)_ ‚Äî `diffRouteSnapshots: (before: readonly RouteSnapshot[], after: readonly RouteSnapshot[]) => RoutesDiff`
- **evaluateCapabilityAssurance** _(function)_ ‚Äî `evaluateCapabilityAssurance: (source: unknown, policyInput: CapabilityPolicy, evidenceSet: CapabilityEvidenceSet) => CapabilityAssuranceRep‚Ä¶`
- **evaluateRouteAssurance** _(function)_ ‚Äî `evaluateRouteAssurance: (source: unknown, policyInput: AssurancePolicy) => AssuranceReport`
- **implement** _(function)_ ‚Äî `implement: <const C extends ContractShape, H extends HandlersFor<C>>(contract: C, handlers: H) => Server<RegistryFromImpl<C, H>>`

_‚Ä¶and 167 more ‚Äî see [`api-reference.md`](../../api-reference.md#nifra) for the complete list._

## Footguns

- This is the unscoped **meta-entry** ‚Äî it re-exports `@nifrajs/core` only, so `import { server } from "nifra"` works. Everything else (web, client, schema, ‚Ä¶) lives under `@nifrajs/*`; import those directly.
